prompt:
Cute Chinese WeChat sticker pack style, single centered full-body mascot, clean white background, no text, no letters, no logo.

Character: white_mochi, a pure warm-white round mochi blob with a tiny green sprout on top, soft rounded body, tiny short arms, tiny short feet, small black dot eyes, tiny cute mouth, large soft pink oval blush cheeks.

Pose: friendly greeting pose, one tiny arms raised in a small wave, bright gentle smile, welcoming mood, a few tiny pastel sparkles near the character only.
